change_request: Add Knowledge Center (Learn section) with index page, article template, and 5 bilingual educational articles
acceptance_criteria: lib/learn.ts created with 5 bilingual articles and ArticleContent type
app/[lang]/learn/page.tsx renders article grid with hero and CTA
app/[lang]/learn/[slug]/page.tsx renders full article with generateStaticParams and generateMetadata
All routes guarded with notFound() for invalid lang or slug
EN and ES translations added to en.ts and es.ts

scope.change_request: Add Knowledge Center (Learn section) with index page, article template, and 5 bilingual educational articles
acceptance_criteria: lib/learn.ts created with 5 bilingual articles and ArticleContent type
app/[lang]/learn/page.tsx renders article grid with hero and CTA
app/[lang]/learn/[slug]/page.tsx renders full article with generateStaticParams and generateMetadata
All routes guarded with notFound() for invalid lang or slug
EN and ES translations added to en.ts and es.ts

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by adding a Knowledge Center with bilingual articles and necessary page components.

risks: app/[lang]/learn/[slug]/page.tsx:ArticlePage - Incorrect handling of invalid slugs could lead to unexpected page rendering.
app/[lang]/learn/page.tsx:LearnIndexPage - Potential issues with rendering the article grid if ARTICLES data is malformed.
lib/learn.ts:getArticle - Risk of returning undefined if slug is not found, affecting page rendering.

llm_analysis.notes: The code uses notFound() to handle invalid inputs, ensuring robust error handling.
No existing APIs or contracts are affected by these changes.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add unit tests for the new functions and components to ensure correct behavior and error handling.

rollback.head: 8359fab96e1814ee879445b357f4b0784b2a5fdb
rollback_steps: 2. Resolve any merge conflicts if prompted
rollback.additional_cleanup: Review affected files for any required data/config cleanup

overall.summary: The implementation meets the change request requirements by introducing a bilingual Knowledge Center with appropriate page components. Error handling is adequately addressed.
